====={{aniseries|JN}}=====
Drake reappeared in ''[[JN088|Looking Out for Number Two!]]'', assisting Ash and [[Goh]] in finding a {{p|Kingdra}} for Goh's [[Project Mew]] [[Field Research|Trial Mission]] in exchange for them helping him out in his treasure hunting hobby by investigating a sunken ancient submersible off the coast of [[Slateport City]].
